Header & navigation

A single floating pill menu — brand monogram, links with a dropdown, and a Book CTA. It floats over photo heroes and over cream alike; an optional announcement strip sits above it; on mobile it collapses to a burger and a full-screen drawer.

Announcement bar (optional)
The figs are ripe · breakfast just got better — read the journal
The pill, over a photo (light scene)
